title: WIP: Add support for wand / wor net type.

features.name: wor net type with multiple assignments
features.description: Code should include a wor (wired-OR) net declaration followed by at least two assign statements driving it

features.name: wand net type with module connection
features.description: Code should include a wand (wired-AND) net declaration used as a connection to module output

features.name: genvar for loop with wired logic net in module instantiation
features.description: Code should include a genvar for loop where a wand net is connected to module ports inside the generate block

features.name: mixed wor and wand net types in same module
features.description: Code should include both wor (wired-OR) and wand (wired-AND) net type declarations in the same module

features.name: wor net connected to module input
features.description: Code should include a wor (wired-OR) net declared and used as input to a module instantiation
